text:
The is one of the Nine Titans found by the Survey Corps during the 57th expedition beyond the Walls. This title may also apply to:
Annie Leonhart - A Warrior of Marley and former member of the 104th Training Corps and the Military Police Brigade; the true identity of the Female Titan.
The Female Titan - The 23rd chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
Female Titan: The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission, Part 1 - The 17th episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
The Female Titan arc - The fourth arc of the manga.
Dark Female Titan - A special Titan who appears in the Attack on Titan video game.
